case_title: P W FU VS. JUDGE CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON COURT'S MOTION FOR PREFILING ORDER PREVENTING FILING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF P W FU A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT WAS HEARD. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF AND ATTORNEY KEVIN MACLAUGHLIN FOR DEFENDANT(S) IN VARIOUS CASES WHERE MS. FU IS THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING WAS DENIED. OBJECTION WAS NOTED. MOTION WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERED MS. FU DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO CCP 391(B)(3). ANY NEW CLAIM FILED BY MS. FU IN THE FUTURE SHALL REQUIRE A PRE-FILING ORDER FROM THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT. PLAINTIFF STATED SEVERAL VARIATIONS OF HER NAME AS FOLLOWS: P.W. FU, PO WAN FU, BO WAN FU. THE COURT INSTRUCTED PLAINTIFF TO UPDATE THE COURT'S RECORD WITH HER MOST RECENT ADDRESS. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AND SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (MAILED TO PO WAN FU) FILED BY DEFENDANT JUDGE CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2012 - CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR ASSIGNMENT OF BENCH OFFICER. (206)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2012 - CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 624. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO VISITING JUDGE LYNN O'MALLEY-TAYLOR FOR HEARING. (206)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS SC-105A ORDER /SENT TO PLAINTIFF - UNABLE TO FORWARD

ORDER DECLARING BOWAN FU (AKA: PO WAN FU, P.W. FU AND PW FU) A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT

ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER AFTER RECONSIDERATION HEARING

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING IS DENIED. OBJECTION IS NOTED. REHEARING ON P W FU'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS IS HELD. THE RULING ON THE APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS REMAINS AS IS. NO FUTURE REQUESTS FOR FEE WAIVER SHALL BE GRANTED AT THE FILING COUNTER. ORDER SENT BY THE COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO PLAINTIFF: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER. RETURN TO SENDER NO LONGER HERE.
